news.paragraph: Recent news highlights growth in Shopify's AI-driven channels and international expansion through new partnerships, such as Emersoft's use of the platform to power UK commerce. These developments align with broader trends regarding the increasing influence of AI on US shopping habits. No specific upcoming earnings or regulatory catalysts are noted in the current headlines.
headlines: Would-be arsonist sets himself on fire during cannabis shop smash-and-grab in Detroit
